name: blueprints
description: Design-doc skills that support implementation: lean-prd (vision + scope), erd (entity-relationship diagrams, 3 levels), domain-models (per-Aggregate .md files with BC folder grouping, invariants, and external-context collaboration). All skills share a naming philosophy (no 'make-' prefix = ongoing maintenance) and store per-project paths in AGENTS.md/CLAUDE.md rather than separate config files.
